arts.ttl: Roma in Como to move further away from the bottom
arts.sum: The Giallorossi want to build on their win against Lecce when they face a Como side who haven’t picked up three points since the end of September Although Andrea Belotti scored six goals in Serie A against Roma, he has not scored in any of his last four matches against this opponent in the competition; the Como striker played 45 games with the Giallorossi between 2022-23 and 2023-24, scoring a total of just three goals (0.07 goals per game, his worst average with a single team in the competition).
